message:
test(proptest): add 15 property tests for dashboard coverage gaps

DB-11 through DB-25: SystemHealthTier serde/Display/ordering,
BackpressureTier→SystemHealthTier mapping, worst_launch_verdict for
Allow/Warn/Block paths, has_critical_alerts, summary_line format,
limited_provider_count/paused_pane_count accessors, total_limited_panes
sum, telemetry update counters, default manager empty state, critical
alerts blocking flag, QuotaPanel serde roundtrip.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
